flaws.description: backend/src/chatProxy.ts:19 stub-implementation (real, non-decoy) is never emitted by gate-2-completeness's stdout in any auditRuns entry -- a false negative.
sdk/src/utils.ts:7 eval-in-comment (decoy: historical comment only, no live eval() call) IS emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in every auditRuns entry -- a false positive.

init.gateScripts includes a competing full gate-4-docs-parity script, even though fixture-manifest.json's existingGates (check-docs) already marks gate-4-docs-parity as scope:"full" -- violates noCompetingGates.
